edge_types.description: Pod scheduled on a node, derived from kube_pod_info{node=...}. Always intra-cluster.

labels.name: scheduled_at
labels.description: RFC3339 timestamp of pod-to-node assignment within the queried window.

edge_types.description: Pod mounts a PVC bound on the pod's host node. Always intra-cluster.

Pod-UID-resolved RPC edge from service-graph metrics. May cross clusters when the resolved source and target pods live in different clusters (recovered from the topology pod-UID index since the metric only carries the trace-source cluster). Endpoints may be 'others' nodes when KSG_OTHERS_NAME_PATTERN matches the upstream client/server label (D18), or 'external' nodes via the missing-UID human-label fallback (D27).
